name: PairCorrectly
description: Step 12.0 baseline — matched-pair round-robin. Every archetype paired with its designed bot: bulwark-control+fortress, ember-aggro+hellfire, hollow-disruption+reaper, tide-thorn-combo+wavebreaker. Cross-pair only (no mirror) so cells are about matched-pair-A vs matched-pair-B, not self-variance. logLevel=llm so the JSONL learning log lands under logs/tournaments/.
